ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "landlord_id" INTEGER /* ID of the landlord owning the property */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Current status of the property (e.g., available, leased, under maintenance) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities in JSON format */,
  "rental_price" TEXT /* Monthly rental price */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last property inspection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the property was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landlords" (
  "landlord_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landlord */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the landlord */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the landlord */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the landlord */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the landlord */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID for financial and legal purposes */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account details for direct deposits */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the landlord account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the landlord account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landlord_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "renters" (
  "renter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each renter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the renter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the renter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the renter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the renter */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number or equivalent */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the renter */,
  "income" TEXT /* Annual income of the renter */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the renter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the renter account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the renter account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being leased */,
  "renter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the renter leasing the property */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "rent_amount" TEXT /* Monthly rent amount */,
  "lease_status" TEXT /* Current status of the lease (e.g., active, terminated, expired) */,
  "move_in_date" TEXT /* Date the renter moved in */,
  "move_out_date" TEXT /* Date the renter moved out */,
  "lease_type" TEXT /* Type of lease (e.g., fixed-term, month-to-month) */,
  "late_fee" TEXT /* Amount of late fee for late payments */,
  "security_deposit" TEXT /* Amount of the security deposit */,
  "renewal_option" INTEGER /* Whether the lease has a renewal option */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the lease was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the lease was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_renter_id FOREIGN KEY ("renter_id") REFERENCES renters ("renter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "late_fee_applied" INTEGER /* Whether a late fee was applied to this payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES leases ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the request is for */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance request (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the maintenance staff or contractor assigned to the request */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance request was completed */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance work */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, landlord, renter) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_file_name" TEXT /* File name of the image */,
  "image_content_type" TEXT /* Content type of the image */,
  "image_file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "image_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Whether the image is the primary image for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the amenity belongs to */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "amenity_description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the amenity is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "review_content" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating of the property (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Whether the review has been approved for public display */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES renters ("renter_id")
)
